lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧੀ ਸਭਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਜਾਇ ਦੇਖਾਂ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sidh samaadhee sabh sunee jaae dekhaan darabaar |
lines.english: I could consult all the Siddhas in Samaadhi, and go to see the Lord's Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਛਾ ਦੇਵਾਂ ਮਾਣਸਾਂ ਜੋਧ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਵਤਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: puchhaa devaan maanasaan jodh kareh avataar |
lines.english: I could ask the gods, mortal men, warriors and divine incarnations;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਸਚਾ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭੈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: agai sachaa sach naae nirbhau bhai vin saar |
lines.english: Hereafter, Truth is the Name of all; the Fearless Lord has no fear at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰ ਕਚੀ ਮਤੀ ਕਚੁ ਪਿਚੁ ਅੰਧਿਆ ਅੰਧੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hor kachee matee kach pich andhiaa andh beechaar |
lines.english: False are other intellectualisms, false and shallow; blind are the contemplations of the blind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਗਈ ਮਤਿ ਪਰਗਟੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai duramat gee mat paragattee aaeaa |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, evil-mindedness is eradicated, and the intellect is enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮੀ ਬੰਦਗੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਏ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak karamee bandagee nadar langhaae paar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, by the karma of good actions, the mortal comes to meditate on the Lord; by His Grace, we are carried across. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਈ ਸਭਿ ਰੋਗ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naau maniai haumai gee sabh rog gavaaeaa |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, egotism is eradicated, and all sickness is cured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai naam aoopajai sahaje sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Believing in the Name, The Name wells up, and intuitive peace and poise are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਤੰਨੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam ratan hai guramukh har dhiaaeaa |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Name is a jewel; the Gurmukh meditates on the Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai saant aoopajai har man vasaaeaa |
lines.english: Believing in the Name, tranquility and peace well up, and the Lord is enshrined in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਸਰੀਕੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਕੋਈ ਤੇਰਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਖਾਂ ॥
lines.translit: hor sareek hovai koee teraa tis agai tudh aakhaan |
lines.english: If there were any other equal to You, O Lord, I would speak to them of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਅਗੈ ਤੁਧੈ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਮੈ ਅੰਧੇ ਨਾਉ ਸੁਜਾਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: tudh agai tudhai saalaahee mai andhe naau sujaakhaa |
lines.english: You, I praise You; I am blind, but through the Name, I am all-seeing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਏਹੋ ਆਖਣੁ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bahutaa eho aakhan sabh teree vaddiaaee |1|
lines.english: Nanak, this is the greatest thing to say: all glorious greatness is Yours. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤਾ ਆਖਣੁ ਸਾਹੀ ਸਬਦੀ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jetaa aakhan saahee sabadee bhaakhiaa bhaae subhaaee |
lines.english: Whatever is spoken, is the Word of the Shabad. Chanting it with love, we are embellished.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਨ ਸਿਆ ਕਿਆ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਜਾਂ ਜੰਮੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jaan na siaa kiaa chaakaree jaan jame kiaa kaar |
lines.english: When there was nothing, what happened? What happens when one is born?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਾਰਣ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਦੇਖੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kaaran karataa kare dekhai vaaro vaar |
lines.english: The Creator, the Doer, does all; He watches over all, again and again

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਚੁਪੈ ਜੇ ਮੰਗਿਐ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: je chupai je mangiai daat kare daataar |
lines.english: . Whether we keep silent or beg out loud, the Great Giver blesses us with His gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਭਿ ਮੰਗਤੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik daataa sabh mangate fir dekheh aakaar |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver; we are all beggars. I have seen this throughout the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai surat aoopajai naame mat hoee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, intuitive awareness wells up; through the Name, intelligence comes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਵੈ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜੀਵੈ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak evai jaaneeai jeevai devanahaar |2|
lines.english: Nanak knows this: the Great Giver lives forever. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai gun ucharai naame sukh soee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, chant the Glories of God; through the Name, peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਪਾਪਾਂ ਮਤਿ ਧੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai saalaaheeai paapaan mat dhoee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, sing His Praises, and your sinful intellect shall be washed clean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai bhram katteeai fir dukh na hoee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, doubt is eradicated, and the mortal never suffers again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਜਿਨ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak poore gur te naau maneeai jin devai soee |12|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Perfect Guru, one comes to have faith in the Name; they alone receive it, unto whom He gives it. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਕਾਰੰਤਾ ਅਜਾਣੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: pookaarantaa ajaanantaa |
lines.english: They recite them, out of ignorance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਪੜੑੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: saasatr bed puraan parrantaa |
lines.english: Some read the Shaastras, the Vedas and the Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਾਂ ਸੂਝੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaan boojhai taan soojhai soee |
lines.english: If they really understood them, they would realize the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਕੂਕ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aakhai kook na hoee |1|
lines.english: Nanak says, there is no need to shout so loud. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਕਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਸੁਰਤਾ ਸਕਤੀ ਜਗਤੁ ਪਰੋਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: aape sakataa aape surataa sakatee jagat paroveh |
lines.english: You Yourself are All-powerful, and You Yourself are the Intuitive Knower. The whole world is strung on the Power of Your Shakti.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਹਉ ਤੇਰਾ ਤਾਂ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੂ ਹੋਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaan hau teraa taan sabh kichh meraa hau naahee too hoveh |
lines.english: When I am Yours, then everything is mine. When I am not, You are.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭੇਜੇ ਆਪੇ ਸਦੇ ਰਚਨਾ ਰਚਿ ਰਚਿ ਵੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape bheje aape sade rachanaa rach rach vekhai |
lines.english: You Yourself send out the mortal beings, and You Yourself call them back home. Having created the creation, You behold it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੀ ਨਾਂਈ ਸਚੁ ਪਵੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਲੇਖੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa sachee naanee sach pavai dhur lekhai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, True is the Name of the True Lord; through Truth, one is accepted by the Primal Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਨਾਲਿ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam niranjan naal hai kiau paaeeai bhaaee |
lines.english: The Name of the Immaculate Lord is with the mortal being. How can it be obtained, O Siblings of Destiny?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਅਲਖੁ ਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਲਖਿਆ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam niranjan alakh hai kiau lakhiaa jaaee |
lines.english: The Name of the Immaculate Lord is unknowable. How can it be known?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਠਾਂਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam niranjan varatadaa raviaa sabh tthaanee |
lines.english: The Name of the Immaculate Lord is all-pervading and permeating everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਦੇਇ ਦਿਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore te paaeeai hiradai dee dikhaaee |
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, it is obtained. It is revealed within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਇ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਭਾਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree karam hoe gur mileeai bhaaee |13|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Merciful Lord grants His Grace, the mortal meets with the Guru, O Siblings of Desitny. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿ ਹੋਈ ਕੁਤੇ ਮੁਹੀ ਖਾਜੁ ਹੋਆ ਮੁਰਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kal hoee kute muhee khaaj hoaa muradaar |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, people have faces like dogs; they eat rotting carcasses for food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਬੋਲਿ ਭਉਕਣਾ ਚੂਕਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: koorr bol bol bhaukanaa chookaa dharam beechaar |
lines.english: They bark and speak, telling only lies; all thought of righteousness has left them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਜੀਵੰਦਿਆ ਪਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਮੁਇਆ ਮੰਦੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin jeevandiaa pat nahee mueaa mandee soe |
lines.english: Those who have no honor while alive, will have an evil reputation after they die.
